untranslatable_reason: This is a pairs trading strategy requiring (1) OLS regression computation across two assets (GLD vs GDX) to derive a dynamic hedge ratio, (2) construction of a synthetic spread = GLD - (hedge_ratio × GDX), and (3) mean-reversion signals on the spread time series. The allowed indicator set contains single-asset technical indicators only (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.) and does not support: cross-asset regression, multi-leg spread construction, or spread-based indicators. Entry/exit thresholds and half-life parameters are marked AUTHOR_SILENT, preventing deterministic rule formulation.
translation_notes: Signal requires quantitative modeling (OLS hedge ratio estimation, spread construction, mean-reversion detection) that falls outside the scope of single-asset technical indicator rules. Backtest engine would need to support: (a) multi-asset regression functions, (b) synthetic spread calculation and time-series analysis, (c) statistical mean-reversion metrics (half-life, z-score of spread). This strategy is fundamentally incompatible with indicator-based rule syntax.
